title: Sumeet Stainless Steel Chocolate Flat Slim N Sleek Canisters/Puri Dabba/Storage Containers Set of 3Pcs Big Set (No.10-700ML, No.11-900ML, No.12-1200ML)
features: Quality Stainless Steel For Mirror Finish, Strength, Durability and Resistance to corrosion.
Without BPA and Toxin. Rust Proof and Hygenic. Dishwasher Safe.
Easily Stackable in to Each Other. Saving Space.
Different sizes which will fulfill all your Storage Needs.Ideal for Roti, Chapati, Khakhra, Thepla, Puri, Bhakri, Chocolate, Buiscuits and more.

Pack Conents - 3 S.S. Flat Slim N Sleek Canisters. Size No. 10 – 16.3x16.3x4.2 Cm, Weight – 260gms, Capacity – 700ML, Size No. 11 – 18.5x18.5x4.6 Cm, Weight – 360gms, Capacity – 900ML, Size No. 12 – 20.6x20.6x5.1 Cm, Weight – 420gms, Capacity – 1200ML.
description: The attractive and elegant look coupled with a classy finish makes this Stainless-Steel Chocolate Flat Slim N Sleek Canisters set a must have for most homes. This attractive mirror finishes flat canister can be used to store puris, rotis, parathas, snacks, khakhara, mukhwas, dry fruits, chocolates, biscuits. These Slim N Sleek canisters are manufactured from Best Quality Food Grade Stainless Steel material and cutting-edge technology to meet standards. The high-quality material also takes care of your health and hygiene. Crafted from stainless steel to add a sophisticated look which ensures strength, quality and durability. Easy stackable in sets when not in use and save a lot of storage space. Easy to clean and all are dishwasher safe. Pack Contains – 3 Steel Canisters with Lid Size No. 10 – 16.3x16.3x4.2 Cm, Weight – 260gms, Capacity – 700ML Size No. 11 – 18.5x18.5x4.6 Cm, Weight – 360gms, Capacity – 900ML Size No. 12 – 20.6x20.6x5.1 Cm, Weight – 420gms, Capacity – 1200ML
